channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitics news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Sanctions IRGC Navy Unit Over Strait of Hormuz Blockade
item.description: The European Union imposed sanctions on two Iranian individuals and an IRGC naval unit for restricting maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, implementing asset freezes and travel bans.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French Fighter Jet Shoots Down Drone in Latvian Airspace During NATO Mission
item.description: A French Rafale fighter on NATO air patrol shot down a drone that entered Latvian airspace, marking what appears to be the first such engagement in Europe and underscoring growing drone threats near Russian borders.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Earthquake Kills at Least 35, Tsunami Warnings Issued
item.description: A magnitude 7.8 earthquake struck off the southern Philippines island of Mindanao, killing at least 35 people, collapsing buildings, and triggering tsunami warnings across the region on the first day of the school year.

item.title: 🚢 Houthis Ban Israeli Shipping From Red Sea Amid Iran-Israel Conflict
item.description: Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthis announced a ban on Israeli maritime navigation in the Red Sea, escalating threats to global shipping routes as the broader Iran-Israel conflict intensifies.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Foils Russian Plot to Assassinate Senior Military Intelligence Official
item.description: Ukrainian authorities announced they had thwarted a Russian plan to assassinate a senior military intelligence official, according to police statements amid ongoing tensions between the two countries.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Blames US for Latest Exchanges of Fire with Israel
item.description: Iran warned that overnight exchanges of fire with Israel will worsen the already chaotic diplomatic process with the United States. Tehran said it was exchanging messages with Washington in an atmosphere of extreme suspicion.

item.title: 🕊️ Trump Says Israel and Iran Seeking Immediate Ceasefire
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated both Israel and Iran are looking to do an immediate ceasefire, and that final negotiations on peace are proceeding. The announcement came as both sides halted strikes.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi Visits North Korea to Reassert Influence as Pyongyang Tilts Toward Moscow
item.description: On a rare visit to North Korea, China's leader Xi Jinping projected unity but also sought to remind Kim Jong-un that he is the senior partner in their alliance, as North Korea deepens ties with Russia.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland Seeks Calm and Dialogue with Ukraine Over Army Unit Row
item.description: Poland's prime minister called for solidarity and talks with Kyiv after diplomatic relations deteriorated over the naming of a Ukrainian army unit for nationalist insurgents who massacred Poles in World War Two.

item.title: 🏛️ FISA Surveillance Law Expires as Congress Fails to Reach Deal
item.description: Key FISA surveillance powers expired after Congress failed to reach an agreement on renewal, raising questions about intelligence collection capabilities going forward.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Trump: New Israel-Iran Strikes Won't Affect Peace Deal
item.description: President Trump stated that recent military exchanges between Israel and Iran would not derail ongoing peace negotiations, despite both sides trading strikes.

item.title: 🛢️ Hormuz Strait Will Stay Open But with Transit Fees, Iran Envoy Says
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz will remain open but under new conditions set by Iran and Oman, including transit fees, Iran's ambassador to Moscow stated as tensions continue over the vital shipping lane.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French Jet on NATO Mission Shoots Down Drone in Latvian Airspace
item.description: A French fighter jet on NATO air patrol shot down a drone in Latvian airspace, the country's military announced, underscoring the growing drone threat near Russian borders.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Foils Russian Plot to Assassinate Senior Military Intelligence Official
item.description: Ukrainian authorities announced they had prevented a Russian plot to assassinate a senior military intelligence official, amid ongoing tensions and conflict.

item.title: 🇳🇮 US Adds Visa Restrictions for Nicaraguans Over Indigenous Leader Death
item.description: The United States imposed visa restrictions on Nicaraguan officials over the death of an indigenous leader, adding pressure on the Ortega regime.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korean President Lee Earns Praise for Pragmatic North Korea Approach
item.description: South Korea's new President Lee Jae-myung is receiving praise for his pragmatic approach toward North Korea and steady diplomatic hand as he navigates regional challenges.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvia Issues Alert Over Drone Incursion
item.description: Latvia's military issued an alert over a drone incursion, highlighting concerns about airspace violations near Russian borders as the Ukraine conflict continues.

item.title: ⚔️ Yemen's Houthis Threaten Israeli Shipping in Red Sea
item.description: Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthis threatened Israeli maritime navigation in the Red Sea, adding to concerns about global shipping and energy flows during the Iran conflict.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo Warns Spain's Parliament World Is in Profound Crisis
item.description: Pope Leo XIV warned Spain's parliament that the world is in a profound crisis, urging action on climate change, migration, and social inequality during his address.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Exports Set for Strong May as Front-Loaded Orders Meet Chip Demand
item.description: China's exports are expected to show strong growth in May as front-loaded orders and semiconductor demand offset broader trade tensions and economic challenges.

item.title: ⚔️ Clashes in Pakistan-Administered Kashmir Kill 11 Ahead of Protest
item.description: Clashes in Pakistan-administered Kashmir killed at least 11 people ahead of planned protests, raising concerns about stability in the disputed region.

item.title: 💰 Amazon and Corning Sign Multi-Billion Dollar Deal for Fiber Optics Manufacturing
item.description: Amazon and Corning signed a multi-billion dollar deal to boost fiber optics manufacturing in the United States, supporting infrastructure expansion.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Sanctions Two Iranians, IRGC Unit for Hormuz Blockade Participation
item.description: The European Union sanctioned two Iranian individuals and an IRGC naval unit for their role in disrupting shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, a key global energy transit route.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Recaptures More Territory Than It Loses Along Front Line in May
item.description: Ukraine's military chief reported that Ukrainian forces recaptured more territory than they lost along the front line in May, despite constant Russian pressure.

item.title: 🇵🇭 19 Dead, 12 Missing After 7.8 Magnitude Quake Hits Southern Philippines
item.description: A powerful 7.8 magnitude earthquake struck the southern Philippines, killing at least 19 people and leaving 12 missing, with widespread damage to buildings and infrastructure.
